description: Fun, style and comfort are the highlights of this red backpack from fastrack. Carry it to college or on a casual day out with friends. A good looking bag with lots of space, it is sure to accommodate everything you think of, while you strut around looking super cool! Made of nylon for enhanced durability Roomy inner compartment with a large zippered pocket A second small zippered pocket to stow away prized possessions A hook for hanging items like socks or bracelets Two zippered pouches on the front with a mesh outer to stow away essentials Brand name printed in large lettering on the front Criss-cross string on the front with spring clasp to customise inside space Brand tab appliqued on the side Haul loop for handling ease Padded, adjustable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuries mobile pouch attached to the strap with a velcro fastener Cushioned panels on the back for added comfort Ergonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortably Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long life CareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
